summary: Stock Dashboard Tab testing completed successfully. Backend API returns complete stock data with totals, bottle_tracking, and skus array. Frontend displays all required components: summary cards, bottle tracking card, SKU table with expandable rows, and refresh button. Negative stock values are correctly shown in red.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_stock_dashboard.py - Updated test file for Stock Dashboard API
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - used existing data in distributor d091204f
context_for_next_testing_agent: Stock Dashboard Tab is fully functional. Backend endpoint GET /api/distributors/{id}/stock-dashboard returns complete stock data. Frontend StockDashboardTab.jsx renders all components correctly. The distributor d091204f-e04f-46f2-b9a9-d92d9f89b528 has 3 SKUs with test data including negative stock scenario.

verified: GET /api/distributors/{id}/stock-dashboard returns 200
Response has required fields: distributor_id, distributor_name, generated_at, totals, bottle_tracking, sku_count, skus
Totals object has: stock_received, stock_delivered, stock_at_hand, customer_returns, factory_returns, pct_stock_at_hand
Bottle tracking has: empty_reusable, damaged, expired, pending_factory_return
Each SKU has: sku_id, sku_name, stock_received, stock_delivered, customer_returns, factory_returns, stock_at_hand, pct_stock_at_hand, weekly_avg_deliveries, days_of_stock
SKUs have customer_returns_breakdown and factory_returns_breakdown
Totals are consistent with sum of SKU values
Invalid distributor returns 404
Unauthenticated request returns 401
Stock Dashboard tab appears in distributor detail page (8th tab labeled 'Stock')
Tab has data-testid='stock-dashboard-tab'
Summary cards show: Stock Received (2,000), Delivered (110), Customer Returns (60), Factory Returns (10), Stock at Hand (1,940, 97.0%), SKUs Tracked (3)
Bottle tracking card displays: Empty/Reusable (60), Damaged (0), Expired (0), Pending Factory Return (60)
SKU table renders with all columns: SKU, Received, Delivered, Cust. Returns, Factory Ret., At Hand, % At Hand, Wkly Avg, Days Left
Negative stock values shown in red (-50 for Nyla 600ml Silver)
Pending factory return notes shown under SKU names
Refresh button works to reload data
Weekly average deliveries shown with weeks analyzed (e.g., '10/1w')
Days of stock shown (e.g., '700d')
Nyla 330ml Silver: Received=1000, Delivered=10, Customer Returns=10, At Hand=1000
Nyla 330ml Gold: Received=1000, Delivered=0, Factory Returns=10, At Hand=990
Nyla 600ml Silver: Received=0, Delivered=100, Customer Returns=50, At Hand=-50 (negative stock scenario)
All 60 customer return bottles are empty_reusable category as expected

api_endpoints_tested: GET /api/distributors/{id}/stock-dashboard - Returns complete stock dashboard data
